title: DfT: senior officials’ business expenses and meetings, January to March 2025
body: "The Department for Transport (DfT) publishes on a quarterly basis details of:   senior officials’ business expenses and hospitality external meetings of permanent secretaries, director generals and senior responsible officers   This data is also available from data.gov.uk at:   DfT senior officials business expenses DfT senior officials’ hospitality DfT permanent secretary meetings   "
